description_long: This is a single-story suburban house with a rectangular footprint, surrounded by a fenced yard and featuring a detached garage at the rear. The house has a flat roof and large windows along the front facade, allowing ample natural light into the living spaces. A driveway leads from the street to the garage, with a car parked outside. The property includes a well-maintained lawn in the front and a larger green area with a mature tree in the backyard. The exterior walls are finished in light-colored brick, and the fencing is wooden, providing privacy from neighboring properties. The layout is compact, with visible interior divisions for rooms and a clear separation between living and utility spaces.
description: A single-story, flat-roofed brick house with large front windows, a detached garage, and fenced yard with a driveway and mature backyard tree.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, driveway, car, and detached garage with a visible front lawn.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the fenced perimeter, side windows, and the garage at the back, with the driveway extending alongside the house.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard with a large tree, the back of the house, and the garage, with the wooden fence enclosing the property.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage, backyard, and the rear side of the house, with the driveway and front yard partially visible.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large front windows
attribute_entryway_design: Simple main entry with a single door, no porch, and large adjacent windows
